title: Senior Product Manager — Patient Journey
description_snippet: Doctolib is looking for a Senior Product Manager to lead the patient journey product area. You will work closely with engineering, design, and clinical teams to build world-class healthcare experiences.

title: Senior Product Owner — Booking Platform
description_snippet: As a Senior Product Owner at Doctolib, you will own the booking platform roadmap, working in agile squads to deliver seamless appointment scheduling for millions of patients across Europe.
